content:
# elizaos-plugins/plugin-jupiter Daily Update (May 2, 2026)

## OVERVIEW 
The development team successfully migrated the Jupiter plugin to the official `api.jup.ag` endpoint, ensuring continued functionality following the deprecation of the lite-api. The update introduces mandatory API key authentication and includes necessary infrastructure improvements to support the new integration.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS

### API Migration and Authentication
*   Migrated service requests from `lite-api.jup.ag` to `api.jup.ag` ([#4](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-jupiter/pull/4)).
*   Implemented API key authentication, requiring `JUPITER_API_KEY` from runtime settings to be passed via the `x-api-key` header for all quote and swap requests ([#4](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-jupiter/pull/4)).

### Infrastructure and Build Configuration
*   Added `build.ts` and `tsconfig.build.json` to support the updated build process ([#4](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-jupiter/pull/4)).
*   Updated `.gitignore` and added project documentation files to improve repository maintenance ([#4](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-jupiter/pull/4)).

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
*   None

## CLOSED ISSUES
*   None

## NEW ISSUES
*   None

## ACTIVE ISSUES
*   None
